rawCommits.cleanSubject: Handle missing nightly assets during prune

rawCommits.subject: Add gh-pages republish recovery workflow
Improve changelog media readability
Tighten changelog media framing
Add GPT-5.5 model support
Report ZERO Pro status with usage
rawCommits.cleanSubject: Report ZERO Pro status with usage

rawCommits.subject: Tighten AI changelog media proofing
Preserve crisp changelog proof screenshots
Enlarge branded changelog proof cards
feat(aura3d): scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout
rawCommits.body:
Add new AURA 3D app to the app registry with Box icon at /3d route.
Three-tab studio layout (Imagine/Generate/Tokenize) with stub content,
left nav for asset history, and Zustand store for app state. Adds
three.js dependency for upcoming WebGL 3D model viewer.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add image generation flow with sidekick panels
rawCommits.body:
Replace tab-based layout with simplified single-page flow: image
generation on top, 3D model section below. Wire SSE image generation
stream with style lock prompt. Add sidekick with Images and Models
tabs for asset management. Model selector follows ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Remove old tab stubs (ImagineTab, GenerateTab,
TokenizeTab).
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add image generation flow with sidekick panels

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow
rawCommits.body:
Create Three.js scene with 4-light rig, GLTF model loader with
auto-center/scale, and WebGLViewer component with full lifecycle
cleanup. Wire 3D generation SSE stream via Tripo. Add viewer
controls for grid, wireframe, and texture toggling. Source image
auto-populates from image generation.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add project selector, feature flag, and store tests
rawCommits.body:
Add project selector dropdown to left nav matching ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Gate AURA 3D app behind VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D
feature flag. Add 9 unit tests covering store state transitions,
generation completion, asset selection, and error handling.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add project selector, feature flag, and store tests

rawCommits.subject: fix(generation): handle upstream SSE frames without event line
rawCommits.body:
The aura-router sends generation events as data-only frames
(data: {"type":"start",...}) without a separate event: line.
The proxy was silently dropping these. Now extracts the type
from the JSON data field when no event line is present.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: handle upstream SSE frames without event line

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish
rawCommits.body:
Add IMAGE section title matching 3D MODEL header. Add click-to-expand
lightbox overlay for generated images with backdrop close and X button.
Set 50/50 split between image and model sections. Center empty state
content. Remove unused search placeholder from registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix
rawCommits.body:
Replace horizontal split with Image/3D Model tabs per feedback.
Use LeftMenuTree from features/left-menu for left nav consistency
with Projects app. Remove section title headers (tabs replace them).
Fix SSE proxy to extract event type from JSON data field when
upstream omits the event line. Update empty state text.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): use project tree nav matching Projects app
rawCommits.body:
Replace custom project dropdown with LeftMenuTree showing projects
as expandable groups. Clicking a project expands it and selects it.
Generated images appear as children under the active project. Matches
the Projects app left nav pattern exactly.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: use project tree nav matching Projects app

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence backend
rawCommits.body:
Add StorageProjectArtifact and CreateProjectArtifactRequest types
to aura-os-storage with client methods for list, create, get, and
delete. Proxy handlers in aura-os-server forward to aura-storage
with JWT auth. Routes at /api/projects/:id/artifacts and
/api/artifacts/:id.

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence to store
rawCommits.body:
Add artifacts API client and wire persistence into the store. On
project select, load artifacts from aura-storage and convert to
store types. Strip style lock suffix from stored prompts for display.
Link images to models via sourceImageId/parentId. Artifact save is
handled by the router — frontend only loads and maps.

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls
rawCommits.body:
Left nav shows images and models with icons under each project,
with prefixed IDs for correct selection dispatch. Sidekick panels
use thumbnail grid for both images and models with section headings.
Viewer controls replaced with icon toggle buttons. Generate 3D
button hidden when model already loaded. Progress messages cycle
during generation. Image preview enlarged and source image
shown full-size.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): wire parentId chain and require project selection
rawCommits.body:
Capture artifactId from image SSE completed event and pass it as
parentId when generating 3D. Proxy forwards parentId to the router
so model artifacts link to their source image. Disable prompt input
and Generate 3D button when no project is selected.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: wire parentId chain and require project selection

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app
rawCommits.body:
Remove VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag and isAura3DEnabled check.
AURA 3D is now always visible in the app registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app

rawCommits.subject: fix(aura3d): move artifact routes to project_routes to fix 404
rawCommits.body:
Artifact routes in process_routes were shadowed by axum router
merge — GET returned 404 while OPTIONS passed via CORS. Moving
to project_routes where all /api/projects/:project_id routes
live resolves the trie conflict.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: move artifact routes to project_routes to fix 404

rawCommits.subject: Fix Windows updater handoff
Harden changelog media proof presentation
Harden changelog media capture pipeline
Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/main' into codex/changelog-release-hardening
Clear stale media paths on capture failure
rawCommits.cleanSubject: Clear stale media paths on capture failure

rawCommits.subject: Harden changelog media quality gates

rendered.title: AURA 3D studio lands alongside a mobile project shell rebuild
rendered.intro: Today's nightly is an unusually feature-heavy one. A brand-new AURA 3D app arrives end-to-end — from scaffolding to a Three.js WebGL viewer and persisted artifacts — while the mobile project experience gets a ground-up navigation redesign with a dedicated Agents roster. Underneath, the release pipeline and changelog media tooling were tightened, and a Windows updater handoff bug was fixed.

entries.title: Nightly release pruning, gh-pages recovery, and GPT-5.5 in the picker
entries.summary: Release infrastructure got a substantial resilience pass, and GPT-5.5 showed up as a selectable model in chat.

items.text: Nightly release asset pruning was extracted into a retryable script that tolerates missing releases and assets, replacing the brittle inline workflow step.
Added a dedicated workflow to sync changelog media into dated history entries and a gh-pages republish recovery workflow so failed publishes can self-heal.
GPT-5.5 is now selectable in the chat model picker, with pricing and server-side routing updated to match, and ZERO Pro status is reported alongside usage.

AI changelog media proofing was rewritten to version 4 of the prompt with stricter heuristics — maintenance fixes, non-renderable support code, and desktop-only updater work are now filtered out of screenshot candidates, and proof framing was tightened for readability.

media.reason: GPT-5.5 appearing in the chat model picker is a user-visible dropdown change that is easily proven in a single raw screenshot. Other items (release infra, proofing tool) are not capturable.
reasons: GPT-5.5 appearing in the chat model picker is a user-visible dropdown change that is easily proven in a single raw screenshot. Other items (release infra, proofing tool) are not capturable.

entries.title: AURA 3D app debuts with image-to-3D generation and a WebGL viewer
entries.summary: A new AURA 3D studio landed at /3d, evolving from a tab scaffold into a working image generation + Three.js 3D preview flow in a single batch.

items.text: Scaffolded the AURA 3D app in the registry at /3d with a left nav, Zustand store, and a three.js dependency set up for the upcoming viewer.

Replaced the initial tab stubs with a single-page flow: SSE-streamed image generation on top, 3D model section below, plus a sidekick panel with Images and Models tabs and a ChatInputBar-style model selector.

Added a WebGLViewer built on a Three.js 4-light scene with a GLTF loader that auto-centers and scales models, toggles for grid, wireframe, and texture, and an SSE-driven 3D generation flow via Tripo that picks up the generated source image automatically.
Shipped a project selector in the left nav behind the VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag, with unit tests covering store transitions, generation completion, asset selection, and error handling.

media.reason: A brand-new AURA 3D studio at /3d with left nav, image generation area, 3D WebGL viewer, and sidekick panel is a large, clearly visible product surface that a single screenshot can prove.
reasons: A brand-new AURA 3D studio at /3d with left nav, image generation area, 3D WebGL viewer, and sidekick panel is a large, clearly visible product surface that a single screenshot can prove.

entries.title: Generation SSE proxy no longer drops data-only frames
entries.summary: A small but important fix to how the server proxies upstream generation events.

items.text: The aura-router sometimes emits generation events as data-only SSE frames without a separate event line; the proxy now extracts the event type from the JSON payload so start/progress/completed frames are no longer silently dropped.

media.reason: Server-side SSE parsing fix in Rust handler. No visible UI change that can be proven in a static screenshot.
reasons: Server-side SSE parsing fix in Rust handler. No visible UI change that can be proven in a static screenshot.
entry only touches release or infrastructure files
fallback classifier skips maintenance commits unless the visible proof is explicit

entries.title: AURA 3D gains artifact persistence, project-tree nav, and tabbed layout
entries.summary: A rapid second wave of AURA 3D work added backend persistence, reworked navigation to match the Projects app, and polished the generation surfaces.

items.text: Added an artifact persistence backend: new StorageProjectArtifact types and client methods in aura-os-storage, JWT-authenticated proxy handlers on aura-os-server, and routes under /api/projects/:id/artifacts — wired into the store so selecting a project loads its images and models, linked via parentId from image to 3D generation.

Replaced the horizontal split with Image and 3D Model tabs, switched the left nav to the shared LeftMenuTree used by the Projects app, and surfaced generated images and models as children under each project.

Polished the studio surfaces: click-to-expand lightbox for generated images, icon-only viewer toggles, cycling progress messages during 3D generation, thumbnail grids in the sidekick, and a hidden Generate 3D button once a model is loaded.
Removed the VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag so AURA 3D is now always visible in the app registry, and required an active project before prompt input and 3D generation can run.

media.reason: AURA 3D now has a tabbed layout (Image / 3D Model), a LeftMenuTree project nav showing images and models as children, and polished viewer controls — all clearly visible in one screenshot.
reasons: AURA 3D now has a tabbed layout (Image / 3D Model), a LeftMenuTree project nav showing images and models as children, and polished viewer controls — all clearly visible in one screenshot.

entries.title: Windows updater handoff fix and changelog media capture overhaul
entries.summary: A targeted Windows desktop fix shipped alongside a large rewrite of how changelog proof screenshots are captured and validated.

items.text: Fixed the Windows updater handoff in the desktop shell, with accompanying updates to the desktop validate workflow and the local auto-update smoke script so the regression is caught on CI.

Rebuilt the changelog media capture pipeline with a new demo-screenshot-quality module, a seed planner, and recorded navigation lessons — adding explicit quality gates and clearing stale media paths when a capture fails so broken screenshots no longer leak into the published changelog.

media.reason: Windows updater handoff is a desktop-only process fix with no static UI surface, and the changelog media capture overhaul is internal tooling. Neither is provable via one screenshot.

entries.title: Mobile project shell redesign with a new Agents roster
entries.summary: The mobile project experience was rebuilt around a redesigned shell, a dedicated Agents roster view, and cleaner tab layouts.

items.text: Added a Project Agents roster as a first-class mobile destination at /projects/:id/agents, rewiring the bottom nav ("Agent" → "Agents"), HomeView redirects, and project layout so remembered projects land directly on the roster.

Redesigned the mobile project shell — new drawer contents, topbar, and project navigation drawer with lazy-loaded Feedback, Feed, and Profile panels — and simplified drawer and sheet controls in a follow-up pass.
Chat gained a mobile model selector in the input bar, and the feedback composer now opens fullscreen on mobile instead of a cramped modal.

Tightened up project tab layouts on mobile (Files, Tasks, Work, Stats, Process) and stopped surfacing raw remote gateway errors in the file explorer, backed by refreshed e2e coverage for mobile navigation.

media.reason: A new mobile Project Agents roster view plus a redesigned mobile project shell (topbar, drawer, bottom nav with 'Agents') is a substantial visible product surface easily captured in one mobile screenshot.
reasons: A new mobile Project Agents roster view plus a redesigned mobile project shell (topbar, drawer, bottom nav with 'Agents') is a substantial visible product surface easily captured in one mobile screenshot.
